ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of the game (e.g., strategy, action) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer */,
  "readme_file" TEXT /* Readme documentation for the game */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Join date of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being played */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player playing the game */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the game session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the game session */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game session in seconds */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the player */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game state */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being played */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the game state */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game state */,
  "state_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state was reached */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player performance entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being played */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the player */,
  "time_spent" INTEGER /* Time spent by the player */,
  "nodes_visited" INTEGER /* Number of nodes visited by the player */,
  "leaf_nodes" INTEGER /* Number of leaf nodes visited by the player */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by the player */,
  "achievements_unlocked" INTEGER /* Number of achievements unlocked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_state_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game state rating */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game state */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the game state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_state_ratings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_state_ratings_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES game_states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player game state */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being played */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the game state */,
  "state_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player reached the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_states_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_states_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "depths" (
  "depth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game depth */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being played */,
  "depth" INTEGER /* Depth of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("depth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_depths_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exact_cuts" (
  "cut_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exact cut */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being played */,
  "exact_cuts" INTEGER /* Number of exact cuts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cut_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exact_cuts_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "window_cuts" (
  "cut_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each window cut */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being played */,
  "window_cuts" INTEGER /* Number of window cuts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cut_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_window_cuts_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "windows_narrowed" (
  "window_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each window narrowed */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being played */,
  "windows_narrowed" INTEGER /* Number of windows narrowed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("window_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_windows_narrowed_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transposition_tables" (
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transposition table */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being played */,
  "transposition_table_size" INTEGER /* Size of the transposition table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transposition_tables_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branching_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branching factor */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being played */,
  "branching_factor" INTEGER /* Branching factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_branching_factors_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., game developer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the game */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
